state.example_zh: 他清楚地陳述了自己的意見。

state.example: The house was in a poor state.
Texas is a large state in America.
state.example_zh: 德州是美國的一個大州。

steak.example: He ordered a steak for dinner.

steel.example: The bridge is made of steel.

step.example: Watch your step on the stairs.
Follow these steps to make a cake.

stick.example: The dog brought back the stick.
stick.example_zh: 那隻狗把樹枝叼了回來。

stick.example: The stamp stuck to my finger.

stomachache.example: I have a stomachache after eating too much.

stone.example: He threw a stone into the river.
stone.example_zh: 他把一顆石頭丟進河裡。

stone.example: The ring has a blue stone.
stone.example_zh: 這枚戒指上有一顆藍寶石。

storm.example: The storm knocked down many trees.
He stormed out of the room.
storm.example_zh: 他怒氣沖沖地衝出房間。

strawberry.example: She picked fresh strawberries from the farm.
strawberry.example_zh: 她從農場摘了新鮮草莓。

stream.example: A clear stream runs through the forest.
stream.example_zh: 一條清澈的小溪流過森林。

stream.example: A stream of cars passed by.

stress.example: She stressed the importance of sleep.

stretch.example: Stretch your arms before you exercise.

strict.example: Our teacher is strict but fair.

strike.example: The workers went on strike for better pay.

struggle.example: She struggled to lift the heavy bag.
struggle.example_zh: 她奮力想抬起那個重袋子。

struggle.example: Life was a struggle for the poor family.
struggle.example_zh: 對這個窮苦家庭而言，生活是一場奮鬥。

style.example: I like her style of dressing.

subway-underground-metro.example: We took the subway to the museum.

succeed.example: If you keep trying, you will succeed.
succeed.example_zh: 如果你持續嘗試，就會成功。

succeed.example: The prince succeeded his father as king.
succeed.example_zh: 王子繼承父位成為國王。

such.example: I have never seen such a big dog.
such.example_zh: 我從沒看過這麼大的狗。

sudden.example: There was a sudden change in the weather.

suggest.example: She suggested going to the park.
His smile suggested he was happy.
suggest.example_zh: 他的微笑顯示他很開心。

suit.example: He wore a black suit to the meeting.
suit.example_zh: 他穿了黑色西裝去開會。

suitable.example: This movie is suitable for children.
suitable.example_zh: 這部電影適合兒童觀賞。

super.example: We had a super time at the beach.
super.example_zh: 我們在海灘玩得超開心。

supper.example: We had soup and bread for supper.

supply.example: The store has a good supply of water.
supply.example_zh: 這家店有充足的水可供應。

supply.example: The farm supplies milk to the town.
supply.example_zh: 這座農場供應牛奶給鎮上。

support.example_zh: 我的家人支持我的夢想。

surf.example: They went to the beach to surf.
He surfs the Internet every night.

surface.example: The surface of the table is smooth.

survive.example: The plant can survive without much water.
survive.example_zh: 這種植物不用太多水也能存活。

swallow.example: Chew your food before you swallow.
swallow.example_zh: 吞下去之前先把食物嚼碎。

sweater.example: She put on a warm sweater.
sweater.example_zh: 她穿上一件溫暖的毛衣。

sweep.example: He swept the floor with a broom.

swim.example: We swim in the pool every summer.
swim.example_zh: 我們每年夏天在泳池游泳。

swimsuit.example: Don't forget your swimsuit for the trip.

swing.example: The child sat on the swing.
The monkey swung from branch to branch.

switch.example: The light switch is by the door.

symbol.example: The dove is a symbol of peace.

system.example: Our school has a new computer system.
system.example_zh: 我們學校有新的電腦系統。

tale.example: Grandma told us a fairy tale.
tale.example_zh: 奶奶給我們講了一個童話故事。

target.example: The arrow hit the center of the target.

task.example: Cleaning the room was an easy task.
task.example_zh: 打掃房間是件輕鬆的工作。

tax.example: People pay tax to the government.

teapot.example: She poured tea from the teapot.

tear.example: He tore the paper into small pieces.

teens.example: Many teens enjoy playing video games.
teens.example_zh: 許多青少年喜歡打電動。

teens.example: She learned to drive in her teens.

term.example: We have exams at the end of the term.

term.example_zh: 她解釋了那個科學術語。

terrorism.example: Countries work together to fight terrorism.
terrorism.example_zh: 各國合作對抗恐怖主義。

terrorist.example_zh: 警察抓到了那名恐怖分子。

text.example: Read the text and answer the questions.
She sent me a text this morning.
text.example_zh: 她今天早上傳了簡訊給我。

textbook.example: Open your textbook to page ten.

therefore.example: It was raining; therefore, we stayed home.
therefore.example_zh: 那時在下雨，所以我們待在家。

thirsty.example: After running, I felt very thirsty.
thirsty.example_zh: 跑步後我覺得非常口渴。
